title: aeschynanthus rhododendron
intro: Aeschynanthus rhododendron, also known as the misnamed "Mistress of the Morning," is a flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been attributed to its alkaloid and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Aeschynanthus rhododendron include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Aeschynanthus rhododendron can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to harness its medicinal properties.
